ab: yamngiya kung maras su babiru’ la.
en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: kasyukay misu.
en: I can lend you.

ab: yamangiya kung maras su uway la.
en: A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: ini kung aras uziy,halay ta mabaziy.
en: B: I don't have one either, let's go buy one.

ab: hata mabaziy su inpit aw?
en: A: Can we go buy a pen?

ab: aw,pabaziy kung lawziy i’ing na.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: hata mabaziy su ni’un kanama aw?
en: A: Let's go get breakfast, shall we?

ab: laxan mu, manani kuzing sali la.
en: B: No, I've already eaten at home.

ab: yangan mu i pasakilux ku sabili la.
en: A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.

ab: hazi hali pasakilux ru!
en: B: Take it to the heat!

ab: yamngiya kung maras su sabili’ la.
en: A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: nanu u pagalagaw ta mani ku sabili mu la.
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let's eat my lunch box together!

ab: nanu ku ni’un su aliyan la?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: pakani kung su kryaxan na pakaba’an biru.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.

ab: nanu ku ni’un su aliyan la?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: niya kuzing maras su sabili sawni,pagalawgaw ta mani aliyan ki!
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I've brought a lunchbox today, let's eat together at noon!

ab: hata i tamapak mari lating aw?
en: A: Let's go play basketball, shall we?

ab: aw ru! hata la.
en: B: Okay! Let's go.

ab: hata i tamapak mari yakiyu aw?
en: A: Shall we go play baseball?

ab: laxan mu, patayux kung su biru’.
en: B: No, I want to study.

ab: ragiy kung musa magan kagaw.
en: A: Please help me with the broom.

ab: awu, bi’ay misu kagaw hani .
en: B: Okay, here's a broomstick for you.

ab: ragi kung magan su i’ing gali aw?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: niya kung kamagaw, tuy iy tu Kacaw ramaw isu magan.
en: B: I'm sweeping the floor, you ask Kacaw to help you.

ab: kamasu’ su kamagaw la?
en: A: Are you done sweeping?

ab: su’un mu kamagaw la.
en: B: I swept it.

ab: huwa su ka ini kagaw?
en: A: Why don't you clean up?

ab: kamasu’ kung kamagaw la.
en: B: I've finished cleaning up.

ab: ma’uraw ku raxayan,haliy i ta’uwax tikay.
en: A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.

ab: awu,hala kung magan su gali’ han.
en: B: Okay, I'll go get the cloth.

ab: ma’uraw ku nyaway hasa,hali i ami’ing tikay.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: na’ tikay han,ini mu masu’iy kamagaw hani na.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I'm not done sweeping here yet.

ab: nanu ku patawawan su kisa la?
en: A: What are you doing later?

ab: musa kung hamkani pasaba’ biur.
en: B: I'm going to see my teacher.

ab: kamasu su miru kisa laga, nanu yuwaw su la?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: musa kung gmalu i rawin mu ma’uwas.
en: B: I'm going to sing with my friends.

ab: kamasu miru hiya laga ,nanu ku yuwaw niya la?
en: A: What's he doing after school?

ab: musa i malangiya hiya la.
en: B: He's going swimming.
